visual_health_inference.reasoning: The absence of chlorophyll-bearing tissue across all designated pots indicates a total failure of the biome. The plants are either dormant, buried, or deceased.

anomalies: Introduction of a white cylindrical sensor/marker (T-1).
Presence of white granular debris in P3.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a complete lack of viable plant life across all four pots. The environment appears to be maintained as a sterile or failed experimental setup. The presence of non-botanical artifacts (spoon, sensor) suggests active human intervention, yet these actions have not resulted in the preservation or growth of the registered specimens. The biome is currently in a state of total systemic loss.
